description: URAQT men's handkerchiefs, a gentleman's must-have accessory for any occasion INGENIOUS MANUFACTURING The handkerchiefs are made of high quality materials, the raw material used to provide this handkerchief is pure cotton, the perfect stitching makes these handkerchiefs very durable and prevents them from unraveling. ELEGANT AT ANY TIME Can be easily used in a variety of occasions and is available in a variety of designs. Pure white handkerchiefs look elegant and elegant on any occasion, anywhere. These are perfect for weddings, business meetings, travel, churches and more. MULTIPURPOSE HANDKERCHIEF Reusable for wiping forehead or cleaning glasses instead of disposable paper handkerchiefs, reducing waste. Product Description: Product Name: Men's Handkerchief Material: Cotton Quantity: 12 Size: 38 x 38cm Care Instructions: 1. Machine washable. It is recommended to hand wash in cold or lukewarm water with a light detergent. 2. Please do not use hot water or larger alkaline cleaning products. Lay flat to dry. Products include: 12 x Men's Handkerchiefs
